topic: Mobbin MCP developer surface for an mcp-tooling transport mode: the official Mobbin MCP server at https://github.com/mobbin/mobbin-mcp-server and official skills at https://github.com/mobbin/skills; tool surface, OAuth/auth, transport, install, search workflows, plan gating, and the read-only Code Mode transport packet with sk-design judgment pairing and a mobbin UTCP manual
research_topic: Mobbin MCP developer surface for an mcp-tooling transport mode: the official Mobbin MCP server per https://github.com/mobbin/mobbin-mcp-server (tool surface, auth/API key model, transport, install) and the official Mobbin skills repo https://github.com/mobbin/skills — app/screen/flow/element design-research search workflows, plan gating (free vs Pro), everything needed to author the mcp-mobbin transport packet (read-only, Code Mode only, sk-design judgment pairing) and register a mobbin manual in .utcp_config.json
